title: Showing only some fields in Gantt view item pop-up

posts.author: elle322 (EM)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently, when an item in a Gantt chart is clicked on, a pop up opens that shows all the fields for that particular item. I would like to be able to hid some fields from viewers. (My specific use case is that I just want to show viewers the description, and I worry they will get lost in the other fields and not even notice that they can open the description field).
